testcase.name: Activity Monitor › system reports degraded mode in test environment

testcase.name: Activity Monitor › activity state listener can be registered
Activity Monitor › activity state structure is correct if received
Activity Monitor › settings reflect activity monitor state
Activity Monitor › activity monitor can be toggled via settings
Activity Classification (Unit Tests Cover This) › 8-state classification is implemented
Agent Gate System › agent events are logged with gate results
Agent Gate System › system reports correct activity state in test mode

testcase.name: Agent Gate System › agent initiation rate is tracked
Agent Gate System › agent dismissal rate is tracked
Agent Gate System › agent status listener can be registered
Agent Metrics Tracking › PRD target: dismissal rate < 12%
Agent Metrics Tracking › agent cycles logged for observability
Reranker Graceful Degradation › retrieval works even if reranker fails
Reranker Graceful Degradation › retrieval returns results in similarity order when reranker unavailable
Reranker Graceful Degradation › empty corpus retrieval degrades gracefully
Reranker Graceful Degradation › retrieval completes under latency target with or without reranker
Reranker Graceful Degradation › chat integration works with reranker fallback
Reranker Graceful Degradation › multiple concurrent retrieval requests handle fallback correctly
Reranker Fallback Behavior Documentation › system reports expected behavior when reranker degrades
Memory Retrieval › memory search returns expected structure
Memory Retrieval › memory search with empty query
Memory Retrieval › memory search completes under 250ms target (when warm)
Memory Retrieval › creates journal entry and retrieves it via memory search
Memory Retrieval › retrieval results include expected fields
Memory Retrieval › memory search handles special characters
Memory & Chat Integration › chat retrieves relevant memories
Memory & Chat Integration › PRD target: retrieval latency < 250ms

Smoke Test — Critical Path › companion panel opens and closes
Smoke Test — Critical Path › journal entry saves and ingests into memory

testcase.name: Smoke Test — Critical Path › app does not crash after 10 seconds of runtime
Chat Interface › sends chat message and receives response via IPC
Chat Interface › handles streaming response deltas
Chat Interface › receives done event with groundedness score
Chat Interface › preserves conversation across multiple messages
Chat Interface › handles empty message gracefully
Chat Interface › handles overly long message
Chat Interface › metrics updated after chat message
Journal System › creates freeform journal entry
Journal System › creates prompted journal entry with guiding question
Journal System › handles empty journal entry gracefully
Journal System › triggers background memory ingestion
Journal System › creates multiple entries in sequence
Journal System › handles very long journal entry
Journal System › journal entry with emotional content

Mood System › logs okay mood

Mood System › logs multiple moods in sequence
